games.name: Sticky Planet
games.description: Launch, Stick, and Survive! Welcome to Sticky Planet, the addictive hyper-casual arcade game where gravity is your best friend&amp;mdash;and your worst enemy. How to Play: &amp;bull; Tap anywhere to launch your ship from its current planet. &amp;bull; Time your shots perfectly to land on the next planet. &amp;bull; Master the orbital physics and changing gravity. &amp;bull; Avoid the void and dont miss! Chain successful landings to build your Combo Multiplier and rack up massive high scores. Featuring vibrant visuals, satisfying physics, and instant-restart gameplay for that just one more try feeling. Can you conquer the galaxy?
games.instructions: Controls - Tap Click anywhere to launch from the planet - Time your jumps to orbit around planets - Collect stars for points - Dont drift into space

games.name: Gothic Knife
games.description: Test your reflexes and precision in this addictive knife throwing game! Your goal is simple: throw knives into the rotating logs to break them. Be careful not to hit the knives youve already thrown! Key Features: &amp;bull; Challenge yourself with endless levels. &amp;bull; Battle unique Bosses every 3 stages! &amp;bull; Explore 3 stunning themes: Cyberpunk, Gothic, and Village. &amp;bull; Collect bonuses to earn extra knives. &amp;bull; Master the Combo system for massive high scores!
games.instructions: Tap the screen or click the mouse to throw a knife

games.name: GasSpark
games.description: Welcome to GasSpark, the high-pressure arcade reaction game where every barrel is a ticking time-bomb of volatile gas! Your mission is simple &amp;mdash; tap every barrel before it overheats and explodes. But be warned: the sparks fly faster than you think. Barrels ignite, pressure rises, flames flare, and one missed tap can start a chain reaction that engulfs the whole board. Only the quickest players can tame the spark!
games.instructions: Tap to break the barrels before blast
